question_text: A block is being dragged across a wooden floor at constant speed. Which statement is true?

options.label: A
options.text: The applied force is greater than the friction force

options.label: B
options.text: The applied force equals the friction force

options.label: C
options.text: Friction is zero because the block is moving

options.label: D
options.text: The friction force is greater than the applied force

explanation: When an object moves at constant speed, it means the forces are balanced (no acceleration). Therefore, the pushing force must equal the friction force opposing it.
